sections.title: In the Lumberyard after Gertrude's Cat
With a kitten or cat in your inventory or following you

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Fluffs.

lines.speaker: Gertrude's cat
lines.text: Purrrrr! So you can talk to cats now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I got this amulet from a Sphinx.

lines.speaker: Gertrude's cat
lines.text: Well, I should thank you for finding my kitten that time. I have a terrible time keeping track of them, and I never know how many Gertrude has managed to sell.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Hi Mommy!

lines.speaker: Gertrude's cat
lines.text: Hello dear!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aww, that's sweet.

lines.speaker: Gertrude's cat
lines.text: Is [player name] looking after you well?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: No complaints, Mom.

lines.speaker: Gertrude's cat
lines.text: Good, good. That's what I like to hear.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Fluffs.

lines.speaker: Gertrude's cat
lines.text: Purrrrr! So you can talk to cats now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I got this amulet from a Sphinx.

lines.speaker: Gertrude's cat
lines.text: Well, I should thank you for finding my kitten that time. I have a terrible time keeping track of them, and I never know how many Gertrude has managed to sell.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They're cute little creatures, aren't they?

lines.speaker: Gertrude's cat
lines.text: Purrrrr!

lines.speaker: Gertrude's cat
lines.text: My children have always been popular with adventurers. They inherit their father's adventurous spirit. He's always travelling the world, when he can find some kind person to help him open doors!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Look after yourself, Fluffs.

lines.speaker: Gertrude's cat
lines.text: You too, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, aren't you Gertrude's cat?

lines.speaker: Gertrude's cat
lines.text: What's it to you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well seeing as I've had to go off and fetch you for Gertrude already...

lines.speaker: Gertrude's cat
lines.text: Oh would you ever quit worrying, I come down here to watch the fights all the time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Gertrude's cat
lines.text: Oh yes, it's a great place for catching a bit of tail.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ummm, ok. I'll leave you to it then.

sections.title: Without a Catspeak amulet or partial completion of Dragon Slayer II

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, aren't you Gertrude's cat?

lines.speaker: Gertrude's cat
lines.text: Miaow!
